title: VGGT-HPE: Reframing Head Pose Estimation as Relative Pose Prediction
abstract: We propose reframing head pose estimation from absolute regression to relative pose prediction. Our method, built on a geometry foundation model (VGGT) and trained exclusively on synthetic facial renders, achieves state-of-the-art results on the BIWI benchmark without real-world training data. The relative formulation allows runtime anchor selection to control prediction difficulty.
